appliedUpdates.description: Documented that rapid OCR (tesseract) via screencapture is effective for verifying WKWebView content that the AX tree doesn't expose, even at 30ms intervals during fast Tauri operations.

reValidationDetails.fixDescription: Close config dialog immediately on scan start, improve stop button UX
reValidationDetails.validationMethod: OCR-based rapid screenshot capture (30ms intervals) + code review + automated test verification

keyFindings: Frame 000 (0ms after Start Scan): 'Scanning...', '0% — scanning 0 skills in 0 projects found', 'Stop & Show Results' button visible
Frame 001 (30ms): '12% — scanning .../projects 30 skills in 30 projects found', 'Stop & Show Results' button visible
Frame 002 (60ms): '37% — scanning .../Developer 90 skills in 90 projects found', 'Stop & Show Results' button visible
Frame 003 (90ms): '100% — scanning .../Desktop 120 skills in 120 projects found', 'Stop & Show Results' button visible

automatedTestResults.frontendTests: DiscoverConfigDialog: 13 passed, DiscoverView: 15 passed, discoverStore: 27 passed
automatedTestResults.keyTest: DiscoverConfigDialog test verifies onOpenChange(false) is called synchronously when Start Scan is clicked

codeReviewFindings: DiscoverConfigDialog.handleStartScan() calls onOpenChange(false) before startScan() - dialog closes immediately
scan_projects() checks SCAN_CANCEL between roots and breaks when set, persisting partial results
discover:found events update frontend store in real-time during scan
discover:complete event fires even after cancel, setting isScanning=false
